testcase.classname: ApiClient Retry Integration › 指数退避retry机制
testcase.name: shouldBeAt网络error时use指数退避retry

testcase.classname: ApiClient Retry Integration › 指数退避retry机制
testcase.name: shouldBeAt5xxerror时use指数退避retry

testcase.classname: ApiClient Retry Integration › 指数退避retry机制
testcase.name: shouldBeAt429error时use指数退避retry

testcase.classname: ApiClient Retry Integration › 指数退避retry机制
testcase.name: should throw error after max 3 retries

testcase.classname: ApiClient Property-Based Tests › Property 25: request去重

testcase.name: shouldBeAt高并发场景下保持queue的FIFO顺序

testcase.classname: ApiClient Property-Based Tests › Property 26: 并发request限制
